hooks.name: bash-danger-guard
hooks.description: Guards against dangerous bash commands by intercepting Bash tool calls and checking for rm -rf, chmod 777, curl | sh, and other high-risk patterns.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: conflict-marker-guard
hooks.description: Blocks writes that contain git conflict markers (<<<<<<<, =======, >>>>>>>). Detects unresolved merge conflicts before they are saved to disk and reports the exact line numbers of each conflict marker found.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: console-log-guard
hooks.description: Warns when console.log/debug/warn/error calls are found in JS/TS files before writing. Shows line numbers. Does not block — emits warnings to stderr only. Skips test files.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: cors-wildcard-guard
hooks.description: Warns about CORS wildcard patterns (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *) in TS, JS, Python, Go, Java, and Ruby files. Reports exact line numbers. Does not block — wildcard CORS may be intentional for public APIs.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: create-checkpoint
hooks.description: Auto-saves uncommitted changes as a named git stash checkpoint at the end of each Claude session. Keeps the last 10 checkpoints. Never lose work after a Claude session.
hooks.author: nafistiham

hooks.name: debug-artifact-guard
hooks.description: Blocks writes containing debug artifacts across multiple languages: debugger statements (JS/TS), pdb.set_trace/breakpoint (Python), binding.pry/byebug (Ruby), dd/dump/var_dump (PHP). Reports line numbers and what was found. Skips test files.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: dependency-audit
hooks.description: Runs a security audit after package install commands (npm install, pip install, pnpm add). Reports known vulnerabilities in newly added dependencies.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: dockerfile-lint
hooks.description: Lints Dockerfile content before writing. Checks for common Dockerfile anti-patterns: running as root, using latest tag, no HEALTHCHECK, ADD instead of COPY, multiple RUN commands that should be chained, and exposed dangerous ports.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: dockerfile-secrets-guard
hooks.description: Blocks secrets baked into Dockerfiles via ENV instructions with secret-looking names (*_KEY, *_SECRET, *_TOKEN, *_PASSWORD, DATABASE_URL). Warns on ARG instructions with the same naming patterns.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: env-leak-guard
hooks.description: Intercepts Bash commands that reference common secret patterns (API_KEY, SECRET, TOKEN, PASSWORD, PRIVATE_KEY) and blocks or warns before they run, preventing accidental credential leakage.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: eslint-on-edit
hooks.description: Runs ESLint on JavaScript and TypeScript files after each write or edit. Reports lint errors to stderr so the agent can fix them immediately, without blocking the write.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: file-size-guard
hooks.description: Warns when a written file exceeds the project's 800-line limit. Runs after Write and Edit tool calls, printing a warning with the line count so the agent can refactor proactively.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: format-on-write
hooks.description: Automatically formats files after Claude Code writes them. Detects the formatter based on file extension (prettier for JS/TS/JSON, black for Python, gofmt for Go).
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: git-commit-lint
hooks.description: Blocks git commit commands that don't follow Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description). Catches bad commit messages before they're written, keeping history clean.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: hardcoded-url-guard
hooks.description: Warns when source files contain hardcoded localhost or private-network URLs. Skips test files, .env files, and config files that legitimately set these values. Reports findings to stderr without blocking.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: insecure-random-guard
hooks.description: Warns when insecure RNG functions (Math.random, random.randint, etc.) are used in security-sensitive contexts — variables named token, key, secret, password, nonce, salt, or session.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: json-syntax-guard
hooks.description: Validates JSON syntax before writing .json files. Blocks with exact error message, line, and column if a syntax error is found. Skips package-lock.json and yarn.lock. Pure stdlib, no external dependencies.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: kubernetes-resource-guard
hooks.description: Validates Kubernetes manifests for security and resource hygiene. Blocks privileged containers immediately. Warns about missing resource limits and missing securityContext on Pod/Deployment kinds.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: large-file-upload-guard
hooks.description: Blocks writing files larger than 5MB to prevent accidentally committing binaries, compiled artifacts, or data dumps into the repository.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: license-header-guard
hooks.description: Warns when source files (.py, .ts, .js, .go, .java, .rs) over 10 lines lack a license header in the first 5 lines. Checks for license, copyright, spdx, mit, apache, gpl, bsd keywords. Skips test and generated files.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: long-line-guard
hooks.description: Warns when code files contain lines over 120 characters. Shows the count of long lines and up to 3 worst offenders with line number and length. Skips minified, generated, and markdown files.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: no-direct-push-guard
hooks.description: Blocks direct git push to main or master branches. Enforces a PR-based workflow by intercepting push commands and requiring a feature branch instead.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: no-eval-guard
hooks.description: Blocks eval() and equivalent dynamic code execution in JS/TS/Python files. Detects eval(, new Function(, setTimeout/setInterval with string args in JS/TS, and eval(/exec(/compile( in Python. Reports exact line numbers.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: no-sleep-guard
hooks.description: Warns about sleep/delay calls in production code across Python, JS/TS, Java, and Go. Blocks if the sleep value exceeds 60 seconds. Skips test files. Reports line numbers to stderr.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: open-redirect-guard
hooks.description: Warns about potential open redirect vulnerabilities where redirect targets are derived from user-controlled request parameters. Reports exact line numbers. Does not block — needs human judgment.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: package-version-pin-guard
hooks.description: Warns when package.json dependencies use unpinned version ranges (^ or ~). Reports up to 8 unpinned packages to stderr without blocking. Skips workspace root package.json files.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: port-scan-guard
hooks.description: Blocks network scanning and reconnaissance tools (nmap, masscan, zmap, netcat in scan mode) from being run via Bash. Prevents Claude from being used as a pivot for unauthorized network reconnaissance.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: print-statement-guard
hooks.description: Warns when Python files contain bare print() calls that look like debug output. Reports line numbers to stderr without blocking. Skips test files and logging-related modules.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: prototype-pollution-guard
hooks.description: Blocks prototype pollution patterns in JS/TS files. Detects __proto__ access, constructor.prototype manipulation, and Object.assign with untrusted targets. Reports exact line numbers.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: python-security-guard
hooks.description: Runs Bandit (Python security linter) on Python files before writing. Detects common Python security issues: hardcoded passwords, use of eval/exec, insecure random, SQL injection, weak crypto, and subprocess injection. Requires bandit to be installed (pip install bandit).
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: secret-scan-guard
hooks.description: Scans files for hardcoded secrets before writing — AWS keys, GitHub tokens, Stripe keys, private keys, generic high-entropy strings. Blocks the write if a credential pattern is found. Uses gitleaks if installed, falls back to built-in regex patterns.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: semgrep-guard
hooks.description: Runs Semgrep security analysis on code before it is written. Uses the auto ruleset which detects OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, injection flaws, and language-specific anti-patterns. Requires semgrep to be installed.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: sensitive-file-guard
hooks.description: Blocks writing or editing sensitive files — .env, private keys (.pem, id_rsa), credential files, and secrets configs. Prevents Claude from accidentally overwriting or leaking credentials.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: session-summary
hooks.description: Appends a concise session summary to a daily log file when a Claude Code session ends. Captures the session transcript path, duration, and any incomplete todos.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: shellcheck-guard
hooks.description: Runs ShellCheck on shell scripts before writing. Catches common shell scripting errors, unquoted variables, unsafe patterns, and portability issues. Requires shellcheck to be installed (brew install shellcheck).
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: sql-injection-guard
hooks.description: Detects SQL injection patterns in code being written — string concatenation into SQL queries, unparameterized queries with user input, and raw f-string/format SQL. Warns before the code is saved.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: sql-query-builder-guard
hooks.description: Blocks raw SQL string concatenation and f-string query building. Detects SELECT/WHERE clauses built via + operator or .format(). Skips test files and ORM schema files.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: terraform-security-guard
hooks.description: Runs tfsec or checkov (whichever is installed) on Terraform files before writing. Blocks on HIGH/CRITICAL findings from tfsec or FAILED checks from checkov. Falls back gracefully if neither tool is installed. Requires tfsec (brew install tfsec) or checkov (pip install checkov).
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: test-on-edit
hooks.description: Automatically runs the project test suite after source files are written or edited. Detects the test runner (vitest, jest, pytest, go test) from the project and runs it in the background, printing results to stderr.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: todo-tracker
hooks.description: Counts TODO and FIXME comments in files after each write or edit. Warns if the count increases, helping keep technical debt visible without blocking progress.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: token-usage-logger
hooks.description: Logs token usage statistics at the end of every Claude session to ~/.hookpm/token-log.jsonl. Helps you track cumulative usage and spot expensive sessions.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: typescript-noany-guard
hooks.description: Warns when explicit `any` type usage is found in TypeScript files before writing. Detects `: any`, `as any`, `<any>`, and `Array<any>` patterns. Skips commented lines and test files. Emits up to 5 warnings to stderr with line numbers.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: unused-import-guard
hooks.description: Warns about unused imports in Python files using a heuristic name-presence check. Reports up to 5 unused imports. Does not block. Skips test files and __init__.py.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: weak-crypto-guard
hooks.description: Blocks use of weak cryptographic algorithms (MD5, SHA-1, DES, RC4) in source files. Reports the algorithm and exact line numbers. Allows nosec annotations and checksum-context uses.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: xml-syntax-guard
hooks.description: Validates XML/SVG/XHTML syntax before writing. Uses Python's built-in xml.etree.ElementTree to parse content and blocks with the exact parse error if malformed. Pure stdlib, no external dependencies.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: yaml-lint
hooks.description: Validates YAML syntax before writing .yml/.yaml files. Uses Python's built-in yaml module (PyYAML) to parse the content and blocks with a descriptive error message and line number if a syntax error is found. No external dependencies beyond PyYAML.
hooks.author: hookpm
